subject: [PATCH v4 2/3] cxl/core/region: move dax region device logic into region_dax.c

2026-03-22.patch_summary: This patch moves the CXL DAX region device logic from the overloaded region.c file into a new region_dax.c file, allowing for additional dax-driver integration paths without further dirtying the core region.c logic. The move includes the creation of a new region_dax.c file and modifications to the Makefile and core.h files. No functional changes are made by this patch.
